metadata.description: Test + security validator that lives inside Claude Code. Runs tests + secrets + SAST + SCA on every edit, feeds findings back into Claude's next turn. Never blocks, never lies.

plugins.name: tailtest
plugins.description: Test + security validator for Claude Code. PostToolUse hook runs impacted tests + gitleaks + Semgrep + OSV on every edit, feeds findings back via additionalContext.
